name: Agronutris
tagline: French insect-protein producer with AI-managed black soldier fly facilities
description: Toulouse-based Agronutris built insect-protein production using AI-monitored rearing systems, originally targeting human food before pivoting to pet food and aquaculture feed. After raising EUR 100m in 2021 to construct a commercial-scale plant in Rethel that started production in 2023, its holding company EAP Group filed for a French commercial-court safeguard procedure on 29 January 2025 amid the wider insect-protein crash that also took down Ynsect.

sources.title: Another French insect protein producer in financial trouble

total_loss: EUR 100m raised; safeguard procedure filed January 2025
